case_title: KHALID ALATTAS VS. TANYA V. MENA

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MENA, TANYA V. HEARING SET FOR OCT-18-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TANYA V. MENA SET FOR OCT-18-2010 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-18-2010 AT 6:30 PM IN 506.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-06-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MENA, TANYA V.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2010 - JUDGMENT. CASE CALLED AT 8:40 AM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. CABTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY TANYA V. MENA IS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
